contents: Firstly, I apologize if I insulted you, and your belief. Secondly, i admit that I was in mood when I was writing this article. So I need to give an apology to the editor who has written this news. Finally, I am not an anti-feminist. Overall, your suggestion is very impressive, however, I believe that I have rights to doubt the purpose of this news. From my thoughts, this article is about a typical issue caused by gender cognition with a series of subsequent effects, and of course, your are correct to say that this news is about the "platitudes in marketing and advertising that 'Does the sex sell'". I may mention you that you were also in anger when you were trying to correct my idea, so I can say some inappropriate words in your reply. You might think that I am a conservative and stubborn man who strongly discriminated all women, while I am not. If it was my words distracted you, I apologize again, but I was really trying to mention people to think deeply in this social phenomenon.
